summary: Completed testing of Teacher Signup Flow feature. All 5 features tested and working: 1) Selecting 'Teacher' in onboarding redirects to /teacher-signup page, 2) Teacher signup page has 'Continue with Google' button, 3) POST /api/auth/register-teacher creates teacher profile with pending approval status, 4) Teacher dashboard shows pending approval banner for new teachers, 5) Teacher dashboard hides stats and tabs for pending teachers.
seed_data_creation: Created pending teacher user (test-teacher-signup-1768313099097) with session for testing pending approval state. Recreated admin session. Created new student user for future testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Teacher signup flow fully tested and working. Key test sessions: 1) pending_teacher_session_token for testing pending approval UI, 2) approved_teacher_session_token for testing full teacher dashboard. The /api/auth/register-teacher endpoint creates teacher profiles with approval_status='pending' and is_active=false. Frontend correctly shows pending approval banner and hides stats/tabs for pending teachers.

backend_tests: POST /api/auth/register-teacher updates user role to teacher - PASSED
POST /api/auth/register-teacher returns existing if already registered - PASSED
GET /api/teachers/dashboard returns pending status for pending teachers - PASSED
GET /api/teachers/dashboard returns active status for approved teachers - PASSED
Full teacher signup flow integration test - PASSED
frontend_tests: Onboarding page loads with Teacher option - PASSED
Clicking Teacher option redirects to /teacher-signup - PASSED
Teacher signup page shows 'Join as a Teacher' title - PASSED
Teacher signup page shows 'Continue with Google' button - PASSED
Teacher signup page shows 3 benefits - PASSED
Teacher signup page shows Application Review note - PASSED
Teacher dashboard (pending) shows 'Application Under Review' banner - PASSED
Teacher dashboard (pending) shows 'Profile created successfully' message - PASSED
Teacher dashboard (pending) hides stats cards - PASSED
Teacher dashboard (approved) hides pending banner - PASSED
Teacher dashboard (approved) shows stats cards - PASSED

feature_verification.onboarding_teacher_redirect: WORKING - Selecting 'Teacher' in onboarding immediately redirects to /teacher-signup
feature_verification.teacher_signup_page: WORKING - Page shows logo, title, benefits, Google login button, and Application Review note
feature_verification.register_teacher_endpoint: WORKING - Creates teacher profile with approval_status='pending' and is_active=false
feature_verification.pending_approval_banner: WORKING - Shows 'Application Under Review' banner with explanation text
feature_verification.pending_teacher_ui_state: WORKING - Stats cards and tabs are hidden for pending teachers
